title: nymphoides hydrophylla
intro: Nymphoides hydrophylla, also known as water fringe or water dock, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the family Menyanthaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving fever, treating digestive issues, and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, Nymphoides hydrophylla is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
